name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish polarized sunglasses with 100% UV400 protection, perfect for beach days and summer outings.

name: Aviator Mirrored Sunglasses
description: Classic aviator frame with mirrored lenses for a bold summer look and maximum glare reduction.

name: Floral Sundress
description: Light and breezy floral print sundress made from 100% breathable cotton. Perfect for summer days.

name: Linen Shorts
description: Relaxed-fit linen shorts with elastic waistband. Ideal for beach walks and casual summer hangouts.

name: Striped Oversized Shirt
description: Oversized summer shirt with classic stripes, perfect as a beach cover-up or casual daywear.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Lightweight water-resistant sunscreen with SPF 50. Protects against UVA and UVB rays for up to 8 hours.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing aloe vera gel that cools and repairs sun-exposed skin. Free from parabens and alcohol.

name: Vitamin C Face Serum
description: Brightening vitamin C serum that evens skin tone and reduces sun spots. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Tinted Lip Balm SPF 30
description: Moisturizing tinted lip balm with SPF 30. Keeps lips soft, hydrated, and protected all day long.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Giant flamingo-shaped inflatable pool float. Durable PVC material, fits one adult comfortably.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Extra-large waterproof tote bag with multiple pockets. Perfect for carrying beach essentials in style.

name: Foldable Beach Umbrella
description: UV-blocking 7ft beach umbrella with sand anchor. Lightweight, foldable, and easy to carry.

name: Anti-Sand Beach Blanket
description: Oversized sand-resistant beach blanket made from quick-dry microfiber. Fits up to 4 people.

name: Waterproof Phone Pouch
description: Universal waterproof phone pouch with IPX8 rating. Keep your phone safe at the beach or pool.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim woven straw hat with adjustable inner band. Provides full sun coverage with effortless style.

name: Flip Flops with Arch Support
description: Comfortable flip flops with ergonomic arch support and non-slip rubber sole. Built for all-day beach wear.

name: Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker
description: IPX7 waterproof portable speaker with rich bass and 12-hour playtime. The ultimate soundtrack for your beach party.

name: Quick-Dry Swim Shorts
description: Lightweight, water-repellent swim trunks featuring a mesh lining and secure zip pockets for beach volleyball or swimming.

name: Hydrating Coconut Face Mist
description: Refreshing and lightweight facial mist infused with pure coconut water and hyaluronic acid to instantly revive tired summer skin.
